---
marp: true
style: |
  .img-row {
    display: flex;
    gap: 1em;
    justify-content: center;
    margin-top: 0.8em;
  }
  .img-row img {
    width: 240px;
    height: 120px;
    object-fit: contain;
    border: 1px solid #ccc;
  }
---
